title: Agent Wiki: A Local-First Evidence-Closed Markdown Wiki for LLM Agents
description: Agent Wiki is a local-first, Markdown-native knowledge substrate for LLM coding agents. It separates raw evidence from synthesized wiki pages, checks evidence-closure invariants with local linting tools, indexes image evidence, provides an optional read-only graph dashboard, and includes a public metadata-only FlexSim 2026 case-study dataset.
